title: Egghead Falls Under Siege
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Lilith, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Luffy, Unknown person #12, Shanks as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: Shaka!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I've got the frontier dome back online...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But the CPO agents have already infiltrated!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: DAMN! We were too late.

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: They'll target the straw hats' ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed! They're already fighting a crewmember that was guarding it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we don't hurry and back him up, we'll lose our ride out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will you look at that? We get to go to war after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Heeey, guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We're already leaving?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we just got here! Come on... let's not rush this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanna stay too, but we can't help it since this is a government island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's noisy out there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You already bumped into that Rob Lucci Guy, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I know, but... oh wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You haven't seen Bowey, have you? She's a pirate lady with long hair!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Now that you mention it... where's vegapunk?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AYAAH!! stop it, Bonney!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We're in a rush here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll explain!! Just hear me out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Shut up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can you turn my dad back to normal?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yes or no?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No...!! Sorry, I just can't!! But there's a reason for that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Somewhere in the waters of the new world

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Woah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Isn't that fish bigger than normal?!

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: Kid! Wake up! We're near land!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Should we go look around?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Are you really asking that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHEN HAVE I EVER PASSED ON EXPLORING AN ISLAND...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I know, but this island is probably...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: The home of the Giants...

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: ElbaFi!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
